aliases: DEXIT Global Limited Formerly NSEIT Limited Trade Globe
DEXIT Global Limited Andheri Kurla Road
DEXIT Global Limited J.B. Nagar Mumbai
venues.marketPosition: Strategic owned digital exam/test-center location in Andheri East, Mumbai
venues.summary: The venue is publicly listed as a DEXIT Global Limited test center at Trade Globe, Ground Floor, Andheri-Kurla Road, Andheri East, Mumbai 400059. Market fit is strong for high-stakes digital examination operations because DEXIT positions itself as a large owned test-center network operator with 237+ owned centers across 230+ cities, ISO-backed infrastructure practices, central vigilance, CCTV, candidate support, and digital exam delivery capability. Andheri East/J.B. Nagar is a commercial transit corridor, which is useful for candidate reach and client visibility, but operational planning should account for peak-hour traffic on Andheri-Kurla Road and clear candidate entry/queue management at the ground-floor Trade Globe site.
opportunities: Public center listing confirms the exact Trade Globe / J.B. Nagar venue identity and support contact, making it suitable for venue verification workflows.
DEXIT's owned-center network and exam operations positioning support stronger client confidence than an unverified third-party venue.
Andheri East is a major commercial and transit zone, useful for candidate accessibility across Mumbai and nearby suburbs.
risks: Andheri-Kurla Road and J.B. Nagar can face heavy business-hour congestion, so reporting time and crowd dispersal should be planned conservatively.

Public sources show both Trade Globe test-center address and Skyline Icon registered/head-office address for the same company, so operational teams should verify the exact exam entrance before each drive.
Market research confirms institutional presence, but final scheduling should still depend on current infrastructure audit, CCTV readiness, PWD access, UPS/genset status, and seating capacity.
